basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website https://www.iitk.ac.in/. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Kanpur Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Project Associate: B.Tech/MSc/MCA + 1 year relevant experience

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Kanpur Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Kanpur Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Kanpur Project Associate positions is July 6, 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Project Associate post is a B.Tech, M.Sc, or MCA degree, along with at least one year of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Project Associate post in the IIT Kanpur recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Associate position will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 25,900 to Rs. 63,700 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Kanpur Project Associate recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for the Project Associate positions in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate posts will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Project Associate positions are contractual in nature, meaning the appointment will be for a fixed term as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur, located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with a pincode of 208016.
